reforms.description: In June 2012, Turkey implemented a new investment incentive package designed to stimulate both domestic and foreign investment, particularly in sectors with high imported input dependence. This package includes generous incentives for long-term private savings and aims to enhance existing investment incentives, fostering growth in the business sector and potentially increasing exports or reducing imports.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform is expected to enhance investment, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The investment incentive package was legislated and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in the investment landscape of Turkey.
reforms.source_quote: Another major structural initiative is the introduction of a new investment incentive system, extending the existing one and making it more generous.

reforms.description: Turkey's education policy underwent a significant reform in April 2012 with the extension of compulsory education to 12 years, aimed at improving educational attainment and quality across the country.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving educational attainment is expected to enhance the skill level of the workforce, contributing to long-term economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The extension of compulsory education was legislated and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a major overhaul of the education system in Turkey.
reforms.source_quote: The extension of compulsory education to 12 years legislated in April 2012 will entail an increase in the average duration of schooling.

reforms.description: Turkey's National Employment Strategy includes ongoing discussions on a new severance pay reform aimed at enhancing flexibility in permanent labor contracts, which is crucial for improving labor market conditions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The impact of the proposed reform on economic growth is uncertain as it depends on the final design and implementation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform is currently under discussion and has not yet been legislated.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is significant but not as transformative as major structural changes.
reforms.source_quote: A severance pay reform is being prepared to make permanent labour contracts more flexible.

reforms.description: A new central registration facility is being established to streamline the online company establishment and registration process, along with improved information sharing between government agencies to simplify regulatory requirements for small enterprises.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying regulatory requirements is expected to facilitate the establishment and growth of small enterprises, contributing to economic dynamism.
reforms.status_evidence: The establishment of the registration facility is currently in the planning stages.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is significant for improving the business environment but does not represent a major overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: A new central registration facility is being built up for online company establishment/registration and information sharing between government agencies.
